## Type of change
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Bug fix in existing skill
- [ ] Documentation improvement

## Skill checklist (for new skills)
- [ ] SKILL.md has correct YAML frontmatter (name + description)
- [ ] Tested in Claude Code or compatible agent
- [ ] No hard-coded absolute paths
- [ ] No API keys or secrets in any file
- [ ] Scripts are executable (`chmod +x`)
- [ ] README updated with new skill in the Skills table
